exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Flat back, pull elbow past torso

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Elbows ~45°, control the negative

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Controlled stretch overhead, ribcage down

exercises.name: Push-Up (feet elevated)
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Full range, controlled tempo

exercises.name: Band Triceps Pushdown
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Constant tension, controlled negative

exercises.name: Band Lateral Raise
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Constant tension, no jerking

exercises.name: Hammer Curl (dumbbell)
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Neutral grip, controlled tempo

safety: Controlled tempo throughout, full range of motion, stop a rep short of failure if form breaks down.

warnings: calves: duplicate 'calf_raise' pattern on Bodyweight Calf Raise — no alternative pattern available in pool, kept as-is

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Elbows inside knees at bottom, chest tall

exercises.name: Glute Bridge (loaded)
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Squeeze glutes hard at top, 1-sec pause

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (bodyweight)
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Controlled tempo, knee tracks over toes

exercises.name: Single-Leg Calf Raise (dumbbell)
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Slow negative, hold top 1 sec

exercises.name: Bodyweight Calf Raise
exercises.tempo_or_cue: Full range each rep, no bouncing

safety: Keep knees tracking over toes, chest up, controlled descent on every rep.
